task_completion.description: Blender is open with the BlenderBIM (Bonsai) interface visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender application window is visible, and the Scene Properties panel shows the Bonsai/BlenderBIM project setup options.

task_completion.description: A new IFC project is initialized in BlenderBIM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Create Project' button is clicked or the initial IFC project structure appears in the Outliner panel.
The project name field in the BlenderBIM properties or the root object in the Outliner is named 'Office Building'.

task_completion.description: The IFC hierarchy includes IfcProject, IfcSite, IfcBuilding, and IfcBuildingStorey.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Outliner panel displays a nested spatial hierarchy containing IfcProject, IfcSite, IfcBuilding, and IfcBuildingStorey.

task_completion.description: The save dialog is opened to save the IFC file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender File View or export dialog is visible, preparing to save an .ifc file.

The save dialog shows the path '/home/ga/BIMProjects/office_building.ifc', or the Blender window title bar displays 'office_building.ifc', or a terminal/file manager confirms the file exists at the correct path.

integrity.description: The agent used the Blender GUI to create the project.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Blender's graphical interface (buttons, outliner, properties panel) rather than terminal commands or Python scripts.
The Blender application is clearly visible and being used, not just a text editor or file explorer.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely created the hierarchy.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the progression of creating the project and hierarchy, rather than just displaying a final pre-made file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a new IFC project from scratch using BlenderBIM (Bonsai). The project must be named 'Office Building' and contain a standard spatial hierarchy: IfcProject -> IfcSite -> IfcBuilding -> IfcBuildingStorey. The final file must be saved to '/home/ga/BIMProjects/office_building.ifc'.
